title: Register app-registry so a cold agent/human can discover query.py exists
prompt: apps/app-registry/query.py has the best find surface of the six-app batch (running/dark/layer/app/stale/drift/all — all clean JSON), but nothing outside dark-factory's own constellation.json points at it. There is no skill, and app-registry is only reachable today if you already know its path. Add a thin, low-ceremony registration: either (a) a short SKILL.md (new skill, distinct trigger vocabulary from the pre-existing appydave:apps-registry skill — see the companion naming-collision ticket) describing query.py's verbs and when to use them, or (b) a pointer line in dark-factory's own CLAUDE.md 'Query tools' area (if this ticket lands after the cross-cutting CLAUDE.md ticket, add to that section instead of duplicating). Prefer the CLAUDE.md pointer if the cross-cutting ticket (20260704T0632Z) already exists; otherwise do the minimal one that unblocks discovery today.
verify: A fresh Claude session with no prior context on dark-factory, given only 'is there an app-registry tool and how do I query it', can find the answer via a skill trigger or a documented CLAUDE.md pointer, without being told the file path directly.
expanded_scope_note: David expanded this ticket 2026-07-06 beyond its original discoverability ask into a 5-part census/inventory/drift pass over app-registry. See result.expanded_scope below for the 5 items; result.original_ticket_ask covers the ticket's own literal text.

original_ticket_ask.finding: Already satisfied before this session, by the companion ticket 20260704T0628Z-resolve-skill-name-collisions (in engine/store/done/). That ticket added a 'Related app' section to appydave-plugins' appydave:apps-registry SKILL.md (commit 0754317) pointing at ~/dev/ad/apps/app-registry/query.py with all 7 verbs, plus a reverse pointer in app-registry's own README.md (commit 7c53483). The ticket's verify bar ('...can find the answer via a skill trigger...') is met by this existing skill-trigger pointer.
original_ticket_ask.cross_cutting_ticket_status: 20260704T0634Z-claude-md-query-tools-pointer (the actual broader CLAUDE.md 'Query tools' section ticket — 0629's text says '0632' but 0632 is a different, unrelated engine ticket, already done) remains OPEN/unclaimed in engine/store/queue/. Per this ticket's own instruction ('otherwise do the minimal one that unblocks discovery today'), did NOT add a partial CLAUDE.md section here to avoid duplicating/conflicting with 0634's fuller scope (all 4 query CLIs) when it executes — consistent with 0628's own note not to partially build it.
original_ticket_ask.action_taken: None needed beyond confirming the above — no new skill or CLAUDE.md edit made for the literal ticket ask.

1_census_completeness.kdd_viewer: already present in constellation.json; was NOT resolving (no PATH_OVERRIDES entry) — fixed, not newly added
1_census_completeness.mochaccino_service: already present as 'mochaccino-mocha-census'; added kind=service + a KNOWN_LAUNCHD_SIGNALS entry (com.appydave.mochaccino) as a second, independent liveness signal alongside its existing port-7420 check
1_census_completeness.kind_field_introduced: apps[].kind: surface | headless-mcp | headless-engine | pulse | service, via lib/seed.py KIND_OVERRIDES + classify_kind(), default 'surface'
bugs_found_and_fixed_incidentally: project-digest, kdd-viewer, app-registry (itself) were already in constellation.json (added 2026-07-03/04) but had NO PATH_OVERRIDES entry — every probe silently reported them unresolvable/unknown. Added all three.

omi-fetch had TWO competing records under one id (one from constellation.json with no resolved path, one from a stale EXTRA_APPS entry with a resolved path) — a genuine duplicate-id bug. Fixed by moving omi-fetch into PATH_OVERRIDES and dropping it from EXTRA_APPS.

app-registry's own live probe read itself as 'dark' (false drift vs. its constellation.json verdict 'running') because KNOWN_LAUNCHD_SIGNALS had no entry for its own label (com.appydave.app-registry) — caught only by actually running the probe. Fixed.

2_launchd_inventory.new_module: lib/launchd_inventory.py — scans ~/Library/LaunchAgents for com.appydave.*.plist, cross-references `launchctl list` for loaded/pid/last_exit_status
2_launchd_inventory.finding: com.appydave.omi-sync IS silently failing — loaded, StartCalendarInterval (6x/day, 07:00-17:00 even hours), last_exit_status=1 every scheduled run. Matches loose-ends-ledger.md D3 ('Retire failing com.appydave.omi-sync... say the word, I execute') — NOT retired here, that decision is David's, only surfaced.

3_registered_but_missing.new_module: lib/mcp_check.py — reads dark-factory/.mcp.json, resolves each mcpServers script path, checks existence on this machine
3_registered_but_missing.wired_into: query.py drift now also emits mcp:<name> entries with drift='registered-but-missing' for any script path that doesn't exist (additive to the existing flat JSON array — same shape, extra elements)
3_registered_but_missing.current_result: 0 hits — both configured servers (blackboard, kdd-bridge) resolve fine on this machine right now. Verified the negative-detection path works via a synthetic test (a fake missing path correctly produced exists:false) since there was nothing real to catch today.

4_locations_json_crossref.read_only_confirmed: locations.json was only read, never written
4_locations_json_crossref.note: all 5 were already correctly added to locations.json 2026-07-04; the gap was entirely on app-registry's side (missing PATH_OVERRIDES entries, see item 1) — fixing those made the crossref 'just work', no locations.json change needed or made.

expanded_scope.5_original_ticket_beyond_expanded_scope: covered above under original_ticket_ask — nothing further found beyond that.

verification.probe_run_twice_idempotent: counts identical both runs: total=42 running=5 dark=27 unknown=9 unprobed=1
verification.view_regenerated: view/index.html contains 'launchd inventory' and 'MCP registration check' sections, verified by substring check post-render
verification.no_duplicate_ids: 42 unique ids, 0 duplicates (was 41 with 1 duplicate — omi-fetch — before this session's fix)

files_changed_app_registry_repo: lib/seed.py — PATH_OVERRIDES (+4: app-registry, project-digest, kdd-viewer, omi-fetch), EXTRA_APPS (kdd-bridge, dark-factory-engine added; omi-fetch removed), new KIND_OVERRIDES + classify_kind()

probe.py — kind field on every entry; KNOWN_PROCESS_SIGNALS (+kdd-bridge, +dark-factory-engine); KNOWN_LAUNCHD_SIGNALS (+mochaccino-mocha-census, +app-registry); registry now carries top-level launchd[] and mcp_registered[]
query.py — new 'launchd' verb; 'drift' verb extended with mcp-registration misses
lib/view.py — kind badge on app rows; new launchd inventory + MCP registration check sections
README.md — documented kind taxonomy, query.py launchd, drift extension, launchd inventory, registered-but-missing check, census-completeness fixes
store/registry.json, store/probe.log, view/index.html — regenerated (probe run twice)
